findings.message:
Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#2527-2598) has bitwise-xor operator ^ instead of the exponentiation operator **: 
	 - inverse = (3 * denominator) ^ 2 (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#2580)
findings.name: incorrect-exp

findings.message:
Math.mulDiv(uint256,uint256,uint256) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#2527-2598) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- denominator = denominator / twos (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#2565)
	- inverse *= 2 - denominator * inverse (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#2587)
findings.name: divide-before-multiply

findings.message:
Math.invMod(uint256,uint256) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#2638-2684) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:
	- quotient = gcd / remainder (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#2660)
	- (gcd,remainder) = (remainder,gcd - remainder * quotient) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#2662-2669)
findings.name: divide-before-multiply

findings.message:
Reentrancy in RealEstateNotary.safeMint(address,string) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4745-4758):
	External calls:
	- _safeMint(to,tokenId) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4754)
		- ERC721Utils.checkOnERC721Received(_msgSender(),address(0),to,tokenId,data) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#3952)
		- retval = IERC721Receiver(to).onERC721Received(operator,from,tokenId,data) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#1077-1091)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _setTokenURI(tokenId,uri) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4755)
		- $ = ERC721URIStorageStorageLocation (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4605)
findings.name: reentrancy-benign

findings.message:
Reentrancy in RealEstateNotary.safeMint(address,string) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4745-4758):
	External calls:
	- _safeMint(to,tokenId) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4754)
		- ERC721Utils.checkOnERC721Received(_msgSender(),address(0),to,tokenId,data) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#3952)
		- retval = IERC721Receiver(to).onERC721Received(operator,from,tokenId,data) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#1077-1091)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- MetadataUpdate(tokenId) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4647)
		- _setTokenURI(tokenId,uri) (../sb/Cartorio_F.sol#4755)
findings.name: reentrancy-events
